task: Create a JSON policy document that allows an IAM user to list all S3 buckets and get objects from a specific bucket named 'company-data-bucket'
Write a Python function that takes an AWS ARN string as input and returns the service name (e.g., 's3', 'ec2', 'lambda') extracted from the ARN
Create a regex pattern that validates AWS S3 bucket names according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, cannot start/end with hyphen)
